description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu Docker image. In a global before_script run apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl libssl-dev pkg-config build-essential, then install the Rust nightly toolchain with curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- --default-toolchain nightly -y. Add a build job that executes /root/.cargo/bin/cargo build --release in the default test stage, with no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
